'''鈭歞-sh-n''' ('''kadashan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:coenact|coenact]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-sh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coenact|coenact]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-sh-n
|-
! Lemma
| kadashan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidashan|thidashan]] || [[word:jidashan|jidashan]] || [[word:shidashan|shidashan]] || [[word:kidashan|kidashan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudashan|thuthudashan]] || [[word:jujudashan|jujudashan]] || [[word:shushudashan|shushudashan]] || [[word:kukudashan|kukudashan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudashan|thudashan]] || [[word:judashan|judashan]] || [[word:shudashan|shudashan]] || [[word:kudashan|kudashan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudashan|thudashan]] || [[word:judashan|judashan]] || [[word:shudashan|shudashan]] || [[word:kudashan|kudashan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedashan|thedashan]] || [[word:jedashan|jedashan]] || [[word:shedashan|shedashan]] || [[word:kedashan|kedashan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodashan|thothodashan]] || [[word:jojodashan|jojodashan]] || [[word:shoshodashan|shoshodashan]] || [[word:kokodashan|kokodashan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodashan|thodashan]] || [[word:jodashan|jodashan]] || [[word:shodashan|shodashan]] || [[word:kodashan|kodashan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodashan|thodashan]] || [[word:jodashan|jodashan]] || [[word:shodashan|shodashan]] || [[word:kodashan|kodashan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dashan|th忙dashan]] || [[word:j忙dashan|j忙dashan]] || [[word:sh忙dashan|sh忙dashan]] || [[word:k忙dashan|k忙dashan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadashan|thathadashan]] || [[word:jajadashan|jajadashan]] || [[word:shashadashan|shashadashan]] || [[word:kakadashan|kakadashan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadashan|thadashan]] || [[word:jadashan|jadashan]] || [[word:shadashan|shadashan]] || [[word:kadashan|kadashan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadashan|thadashan]] || [[word:jadashan|jadashan]] || [[word:shadashan|shadashan]] || [[word:kadashan|kadashan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadashan|shadashan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadashan|goshadashan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadashan|gokishadashan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadashan眉|shadashan眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadashankn眉|goshadashankn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadashan眉|gokishadashan眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadashansh毛|shadashansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadashanksh毛|goshadashanksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadashansh毛|gokishadashansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadashanro|shadashanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadashankro|goshadashankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadashanro|gokishadashanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadashanmu|shadashanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadashankmu|goshadashankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadashanmu|gokishadashanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadashansher|shadashansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadashanksher|goshadashanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadashansher|gokishadashansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadashang|shadashang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadashankng|goshadashankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadashang|gokishadashang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadashanya|shadashanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadashankya|goshadashankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadashanya|gokishadashanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadashanyam|shadashanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadashankyam|goshadashankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadashanyam|gokishadashanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadashan眉sh毛|shadashan眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadashankn眉sh毛|goshadashankn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadashan眉sh毛|gokishadashan眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadashan眉ro|shadashan眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadashankn眉ro|goshadashankn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadashan眉ro|gokishadashan眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadashan眉mu|shadashan眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadashankn眉mu|goshadashankn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadashan眉mu|gokishadashan眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadashansh毛n眉|shadashansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadashanksh毛n眉|goshadashanksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadashansh毛n眉|gokishadashansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadashansh毛ro|shadashansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadashanksh毛ro|goshadashanksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadashansh毛ro|gokishadashansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadashansh毛mu|shadashansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadashanksh毛mu|goshadashanksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadashansh毛mu|gokishadashansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadashanron眉|shadashanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadashankron眉|goshadashankron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadashanron眉|gokishadashanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadashanrosh毛|shadashanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadashankrosh毛|goshadashankrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadashanrosh毛|gokishadashanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadashanromu|shadashanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadashankromu|goshadashankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadashanromu|gokishadashanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadashanmun眉|shadashanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadashankmun眉|goshadashankmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadashanmun眉|gokishadashanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadashanmush毛|shadashanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadashankmush毛|goshadashankmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadashanmush毛|gokishadashanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadashanmuro|shadashanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadashankmuro|goshadashankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadashanmuro|gokishadashanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
